label: plain_text
text:
1.  (i) The line of sight is the line drawn from the eye of an observer to the point in the
objectviewedbytheobserver.
11
The angle of elevation of an object viewed, is the angle formed by the line of sight
with the horizontal when it is above the horizontallevel, i.e., the case when we raise
our head to look at the object.
(ii)The angle of depression of an object viewed, is the angle formed by the line of sight
with the horizontal when it is below the horizontal level, i.e., the case when we lower
our head to look at the object.
